login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Enter your email and password.
login.resetSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in now.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: It only takes a minute. We'll email a verification link.
register.subtitleSent: We sent you a verification link. Click it to activate your account.
register.spamHint: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder. The link only works once.
register.passwordHint: Use at least 6 characters. A mix of letters and numbers is best.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Pick a strong password you haven't used before.
reset.subtitleInvalid: Your reset link is no longer valid or has expired.

error.title: Connection Refused
error.subtitle: The link is invalid, expired, or already used.
error.fallback: Try signing in again, or request a new link if this was a recovery email.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.invalidCredentialsOrUnverified: Invalid email or password, or email not yet verified
errors.resetExpired: Reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.couldNotUpdatePassword: Could not update password. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Could not delete account. Please try again.

messages.registerSent: If this email is new, check your inbox to verify your account. If you already have an account, you can log in.
messages.resetSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
messages.verificationSent: If your account needs verification, a new email has been sent.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Grid
welcome.intro: Denaro is your AI trading analyst. To tune the system to your style, answer 3 quick questions — your top pairs, your strategy lens, and what to call you.
welcome.duration: Takes about 30 seconds. Settings are editable later.

pairs.title: Pick your top 3 pairs
pairs.subtitle: Denaro will tune analysis to these markets.

strategy.title: Pick your strategy
strategy.subtitle: Denaro will use this lens for every analysis.

name.title: What should Denaro call you?
name.subtitle: Optional. Defaults to your email handle.
name.label: Display name

smc.label: Smart Money Concepts
smc.blurb: Institutional order flow. BoS, CHoCH, order blocks, FVGs, liquidity sweeps.

price-action.label: Price Action
price-action.blurb: Pure structure. Supply / demand zones, candlestick reads, market profile.

trend.label: Trend Following
trend.blurb: Ride the dominant trend. Breakouts, pullback entries, momentum continuation.

mean-reversion.label: Mean Reversion
mean-reversion.blurb: Fade extremes. Range plays, exhaustion entries at range bounds.

scalping.label: Scalping
scalping.blurb: Fast intraday. M1–M15 setups, high frequency, tight risk.

swing.label: Swing Trading
swing.blurb: Multi-day positions. HTF bias (D1+H4), patient entries, extended TPs.

session.label: // TRADING SESSIONS
session.hint: Active forex trading sessions right now

pairCard.confluenceTooltip: Confluence: {score}/100 — AI conviction across signals (trend, structure, key levels, momentum, macro). Higher = more agreement.
pairCard.confluenceLegendBody: How much the AI's signals agree on the bias call. Higher means stronger setup.

newsCard.empty: No medium / high-impact events scheduled for {pair} this week.

vision.title: HTF → MTF → LTF Snap
vision.subtitle: Capture 4H · 1H · 15M for the selected pair and let Denaro read the full stack.
vision.captureNote: {pair} multi-timeframe stack — chart 1 = HTF (4H), chart 2 = MTF (1H), chart 3 = LTF (15M).

ask.title: Ask Denaro
ask.subtitle: Concepts, setup reviews, position sizing, market reads — anything that doesn't need a chart screenshot.
ask.tip: Tip: square brackets like {bracket} in the templates are placeholders — replace before sending.
examples: Explain liquidity sweeps with examples on XAUUSD
I bought EURUSD at 1.1750, SL 1.1720, TP 1.1810 — anything wrong?
What macro events this week could move USD pairs?
How do I read order flow on a 15M chart?

quick.conceptPrompt: In one paragraph each, explain CHoCH vs BoS, and when each one signals a real shift in market structure.
quick.whyMovingPrompt: Why might {pair} be moving the way it is right now? Give 3 candidate drivers — macro, structural, and session-driven — and rank them by likelihood.
quick.sizingPrompt: Help me size a trade. Account size: $[1000]. Risk per trade: [1]%. Pair: {pair}. Entry: [price]. Stop loss: [price]. Calculate: dollar risk, position size in lots/units, and a sanity check on the SL distance.
quick.reviewPrompt:
Review this setup for {pair} from a {lens} perspective.

Entry: [price]
Stop loss: [price]
Take profit: [price]
Reason: [why I'm taking it]

Tell me: is the structure clean? What invalidates it? Anything I missed?
quick.sessionPrompt: For my pairs ({list}) and a {lens} approach, which trading session(s) historically offer the cleanest setups, and why? Be specific about volatility windows and avoid generic advice.
quick.backtestPrompt: Give me a 5-step plan to backtest a {lens} strategy on {pair}. Include: data window, entry rule, exit rule, what stats to track, and what disqualifies the strategy.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune your profile, markets, and strategy lens.

identity.title: Identity
identity.subtitle: How Denaro addresses you and your account email.

markets.title: Markets
markets.subtitle: Up to 3 pairs Denaro will monitor for you.

strategy.title: Strategy lens
strategy.subtitle: The framework Denaro uses for every analysis.

session.title: Session
session.subtitle: Sign out everywhere on this device.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.subtitle: Permanent actions. Read carefully before proceeding.
danger.warning: This deletes your account, profile, and all settings. This cannot be undone. Type DELETE to confirm.

fields.emailHint: Email is tied to your account and can't be changed here.
